JavaScript bindings, event loop, launcher, library registry, and utility structures for JerryScript on Mbed OS.

## Folders
- **[jerryscript-mbed-drivers](jerryscript-mbed-drivers/README.md)**: JavaScript bindings, native functions, and header files for mbed operations in JerryScript, including assert, DigitalOut, I2C, InterruptIn, and timers.
- **[jerryscript-mbed-event-loop](jerryscript-mbed-event-loop/README.md)**: Singleton event loop implementation and callback binding templates for JerryScript mbed environment.
- **[jerryscript-mbed-launcher](jerryscript-mbed-launcher/README.md)**: Launches and executes JavaScript with JerryScript on Mbed OS, including headers for setup and execution.
- **[jerryscript-mbed-library-registry](jerryscript-mbed-library-registry/README.md)**: Defines and manages JerryScript library functions and class constructors for Mbed OS.
- **[jerryscript-mbed-util](jerryscript-mbed-util/README.md)**: Defines structures for JavaScript source code, logging macros, and JavaScript wrapper function macros.
